nasb.text: But thanks be to God who puts the same earnestness on your behalf in the heart of Titus.

esv.text: But thanks be to God, who put into the heart of Titus the same earnest care I have for you.

cnv.text: 感謝　神，他把我對你們那樣的熱情，放在提多的心裡。

ccb.text: 感谢上帝！祂感动了提多的心，使他像我一样热诚地关怀你们。

csbs.text: 感谢神，他为了你们，把同样的殷勤放在提多的心里。
